title: Roasted Smoky German Chicken Skewers
description: A smoky and crisp German dish featuring chicken breast, kombu-cold-extract, and a blend of spices, served on a wooden board.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together kombu-cold-extract, smoked paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken breast pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Thread the chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with lemon juice and olive oil.
Place the skewers on a wooden board lined with parchment paper.
Roast the skewers in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
